site.title: SoulSound World

hero.title: SoulSound World
hero.subtitle: Open Build Hub
hero.tagline: Where sound, story, and survival converge.
hero.mission: SoulSound exists at the intersection of music, narrative, and transformation. We create artifacts that help you stay coherent in an accelerating world.

open_build.title: Open Build
open_build.subtitle: Live Development Log
open_build.description: Watch the SoulSound ecosystem evolve in real-time. From narrative milestones to tool releases, every update is documented.

music_hub.title: Music Hub
music_hub.subtitle: Sounds & Frequencies
music_hub.description: Discover Samzin Kreave's music across platforms. Listen on Spotify, create on Suno, collaborate on BandLab.

story_world.title: Story World
story_world.subtitle: Narrative Universe

stories.title: Tomorrow's Yesterday Echo
stories.description: A narrative about presence, memory, and transformation.

stories.title: Joker for the Queen
stories.description: A story of power, consequence, and choice.

expression_engine.title: Expression Engine
expression_engine.subtitle: AI Caption & Content Generator
expression_engine.description: Paste a music link. Get instant captions, hashtags, video concepts, and voiceover scripts.

revenue_accelerator.title: Revenue Accelerator
revenue_accelerator.subtitle: Growth & Monetization Dashboard
revenue_accelerator.description: Track your creative revenue across all platforms. Monitor health, identify opportunities, and scale strategically.

frequency_stacking.title: Frequency Stacking
frequency_stacking.subtitle: Cooperative Mythic Coherence Game
frequency_stacking.description: A tabletop RPG about staying human in accelerating systems. 2-5 players, 60-180 minutes, no winning—only outcomes.

signal_records.title: Signal Records
signal_records.subtitle: Build Archive & Milestones
signal_records.description: A chronological record of the SoulSound ecosystem's evolution. Every milestone, every signal, documented.

the_depth.title: The Depth
the_depth.subtitle: Samzin Kreave — Signal Record
the_depth.description: Not a résumé. Not a pitch. A signal record of the artist, the human, and the witness.

social_world.title: Social World

social_world.description: The living signal layer. Follow, engage, and stay connected across all platforms.
